# Vike docs — AI header

> **CRITICAL FOR AI AGENTS:**
> - READ THIS ENTIRE FILE - don't stop at the top
> - These are connection points, NOT actual documentation
> - MUST fetch actual pages when you identify matches
> - MUST open relevant pages based on user prompts

Vike = Vite-based full-stack framework (SSR/SSG/SPA), stack-agnostic, Next.js/Nuxt alternative. Paths below are relative to `https://vike.dev` (e.g. `/data` → `https://vike.dev/data`).

## Core architecture (read first)
- `/render-modes` — SSR vs SSG (pre-render) vs SPA vs HTML-only; mix per page; chosen via where code runs
- `/config` — `+config.js` files, cumulative config & inheritance, `.clear.js`/`.default.js`, pointer imports, global vs per-page
- `/meta` — define/modify custom config settings & hooks; hook env (server/client/config/production); cumulative; effect
- `/file-env` — `.server.js`/`.client.js`/`.shared.js`/`.ssr.js` suffixes control execution environment; protect secrets
- `/file-structure` — project layout, `/pages/`, co-located `+Page`/`+Layout`/`+route`, domain-driven directories
- `/extension-vs-custom` — `vike-react`/`vike-vue`/`vike-solid` vs manual integration; when to go custom
- `/` — homepage / introduction

## Get started
- `/new` — scaffold new app (`npm create vike`, Bati generator), React/Vue/Solid
- `/add` — add SSR/SSG to an existing Vite app
- `/new/core` — scaffold without a framework extension (Vike core only)

## Framework extensions (recommended setup)
- `/vike-react` — React: SSR/SSG, `useData`, layouts, streaming, Next.js-like DX
- `/vike-vue` — Vue: SSR/SSG, composables, `onCreateApp`, Nuxt-like DX
- `/vike-solid` — Solid: SSR/SSG, layouts, head tags, streaming
- `/extensions` — what extensions are; ecosystem overview
- `/extends` — install/compose extensions in `+config.js`
- `/require` — declare required extension/Vike semver versions
- `/react-setting` — `+react`: vike-react options (hydrateRoot/createRoot, render-to-string/stream, SEO strategy, error callbacks)
- `/reactStrictMode` — `reactStrictMode`: toggle React StrictMode (vike-react)

## Routing
- `/routing` — overview: filesystem vs Route String vs Route Function, params, guards
- `/filesystem-routing` — file-based URLs, ignored dirs (`pages`/`index`/`src`/`renderer`), `(groups)`, inheritance
- `/route` — `+route` setting (string or function)
- `/route-string` — `@param`, catch-all `*`, globs, precedence
- `/route-function` — custom JS routing logic, precedence values, sync-only, conditional/auth routing
- `/routing-precedence` — conflict resolution, specificity ranking
- `/filesystemRoutingRoot` — remap a directory's filesystem path to a URL root
- `/base-url` — `base`/`baseAssets`/`baseServer`, subdirectory hosting, CDN assets
- `/active-links` — active-link styling via `usePageContext`
- `/i18n` — locale routing (path/domain/header), `onBeforeRoute`, `modifyUrl`, per-locale pre-render
- `/url-normalization` — trailing slash, duplicate-slash 301s, `disableUrlNormalization`

## Data fetching, pageContext & globalContext
- `/data-fetching` — overview: `+data`, `useData`, RPC (Telefunc/tRPC), TanStack Query, GraphQL, mutations, global data
- `/data` — `+data()` hook: server-side data loading (DB/ORM/SQL); pairs with `useData`
- `/useData` — access `+data` result in components (typed)
- `/onBeforeRender` — advanced data orchestration; set multiple `pageContext` values
- `/onData` — runs after `+data`; store init; avoid hydration mismatch
- `/pageContext` — built-in props (`urlParsed`, `routeParams`, `data`, …) + custom props; TS narrowing
- `/usePageContext` — access `pageContext` in any component (no prop drilling)
- `/passToClient` — serialize `pageContext`/`globalContext` to client (dot-path list)
- `/globalContext` — app-wide shared state, pages list, runtime config
- `/getGlobalContext` — access `globalContext` anywhere (incl. before requests)
- `/getPageContext` — access `pageContext` fallback (Node async hooks); last resort
- `/getPageContextClient` — client-only `pageContext` access after navigation
- `/onCreatePageContext` — init custom props/instances when `pageContext` is created
- `/onCreateGlobalContext` — app-wide init: global fetch, auth from cookies, store init
- `/pageContext.json` — client-nav data requests; when triggered; perf
- `/pageContext-manipulation` — extend `pageContext` immutably; anti-patterns

## Rendering, hydration & SSR/SPA control
- `/ssr` — `+ssr`: toggle SSR per page (SPA / client-only pages)
- `/clientRouting` — `+clientRouting`: SPA navigation, intercept `<a>`, `data-vike=false`
- `/client-routing` — client-side nav, state preservation, transitions, nested layouts
- `/server-routing` — full-page-reload navigation (default), simplicity
- `/server-routing-vs-client-routing` — tradeoffs, when to use which
- `/streaming` — HTML/SSR streaming: `pipe`/web/node streams, `stampPipe`, edge/Node/Cloudflare
- `/stream` — `+stream` setting (toggle/configure streaming)
- `/Page` — `+Page` root component / page entry
- `/Layout` — `+Layout` shared UI wrapper; nested/multiple layouts
- `/Wrapper` — `+Wrapper` outermost wrapper for context providers (state/data/i18n)
- `/error-page` — custom error page (`_error`): 404/401/403, `is404`, `abortReason`, prerendered `404.html`
- `/Loading` — `<Loading>` Suspense fallback (vike-react)
- `/ClientOnly` — render a component only on the client (avoids "window is not defined")
- `/clientOnly-helper` — `clientOnly()` lazy client-only loader (prefer `<ClientOnly>`)
- `/useHydrated` — false during SSR, true after hydration; conditional interactive UI
- `/hydrationCanBeAborted` — allow aborting hydration on fast navigation
- `/onRenderHtml` — server render glue to UI framework (custom integration)
- `/onRenderClient` — client render/hydrate glue (custom integration)

## Head, SEO & HTML shell
- `/head-tags` — overview: title/description/social image, favicon, `<Head>`, dynamic/data-driven, i18n
- `/Head` — `+Head` custom head tags, raw HTML, favicon, OG/social meta, scripts
- `/title` — `+title` (static or `pageContext` fn); also `og:title`
- `/description` — `+description` meta + `og:description`
- `/image` — `+image` social/OG/Twitter preview image
- `/viewport` — `+viewport` meta (responsive/zoom; `null` to disable)
- `/favicon` — `+favicon` (experimental; prefer `+Head`)
- `/lang` — `+lang` HTML `lang` attribute (i18n/SEO)
- `/htmlAttributes` — `<html>` attrs (dark-mode class, `lang`, …)
- `/bodyAttributes` — `<body>` attrs
- `/useConfig` — set head/shell settings imperatively from hooks/components (dynamic SEO from data)
- `/head-manual` — head tags without `vike-{react,vue,solid}` (`onRenderHtml`, `escapeInject`)
- `/headHtmlBegin` · `/headHtmlEnd` · `/bodyHtmlBegin` · `/bodyHtmlEnd` — inject raw HTML into `<head>`/`<body>` shell (portal/teleport roots; prefer `+Head`)
- `/injectScriptsAt` — control script injection location (`HTML_BEGIN`/`HTML_END`/`STREAM`)
- `/injectFilter` — control which preload/asset tags Vike injects
- `/injectAssets` — auto-inject scripts/styles/preload (manual integration)

## Lifecycle hooks
Hooks are `+onX.js` config files; many require `vike-react`/`vue`/`solid`. Order & environments: `/hooks`.
- `/hooks` — all hooks, execution order, environments (server/client/shared)
- `/guard` — `+guard()` route protection/auth; runs before `+data`
- `/onError` — server-side error tracking/logging (cumulative)
- `/onBeforeRoute` — pre-routing: i18n/URL rewrite, locale extraction
- `/onBeforeRenderHtml` · `/onAfterRenderHtml` — server, around Page→HTML (CSS-in-JS; HTML mutation; state dehydration)
- `/onBeforeRenderClient` · `/onAfterRenderClient` — client, around render (state-mgmt init; post-mount/analytics)
- `/onHydrationEnd` — once after first hydration (init analytics/listeners); Client Routing
- `/onPageTransitionStart` · `/onPageTransitionEnd` — client-nav transition animations
- `/client` — `+client.js`: runs once on load (analytics, error tracking, cookie consent)
- `/clientHooks` — load client hooks per page (bundle size; HTML-only pages)
- `/onCreateApp` — Vue-only: configure app instance / register plugins
- `/onHookCall` — instrument every hook (tracing/perf; beta)
- `/hooksTimeout` — per-hook warning/error timeouts

## Navigation & control flow
- `/navigate` — programmatic client navigation (Client Routing)
- `/reload` — re-render current page via client router
- `/prefetch` — programmatically preload a page's assets
- `/prefetchStaticAssets` — `+prefetchStaticAssets`: hover/viewport prefetch strategy
- `/keepScrollPosition` — `+keepScrollPosition`: preserve scroll across navigation
- `/redirect` — `throw redirect()` (302/301); auth flows; inside `guard`/`data`
- `/render` — `throw render()`: show error page (401/403/404/…) or rewrite to another page, same URL
- `/abort` — `throw redirect()` vs `throw render()` vs `navigate()`
- `/modifyUrl` — build/modify URLs (mainly i18n locale)

## Server, API routes & JavaScript API
- `/server` — `+server.js` entry; integrate Hono/Express/Fastify/H3/Elysia; built-in server; HMR; standalone deploy
- `/renderPage` — SSR middleware entry: integrate Vike into any server; returns HTML/status/headers ("Vike is just middleware")
- `/api-routes` — HTTP endpoints (GET/POST), file uploads; vs Telefunc RPC
- `/api` — JS API: `dev()`/`build()`/`preview()`/`prerender()` for custom scripts/CLIs
- `/cli` — Vike CLI (`dev`/`build`/`preview`/`prerender`), flags, `VIKE_CONFIG`
- `/createDevMiddleware` — dev middleware (HMR) for custom servers
- `/vite-plugin` — Vike's Vite plugin (configured via `+` files, no plugin options)
- `/getVikeConfig` — read Vike config inside custom Vite plugins (build/dev)
- `/escapeInject` — safe SSR HTML template tag; `dangerouslySkipEscape()`
- `/host` · `/port` · `/force` · `/mode` — `+host`/`+port`/`+force`/`+mode` (aliases for Vite `--host`/`--port`/`--force`/`--mode`)

## Pre-rendering (SSG)
- `/pre-rendering` — overview: build-time HTML, partial/selective, parameterized routes, SSG+SSR+SPA hybrid
- `/prerender` — `+prerender`: `disableAutoRun`, `redirects`, `noExtraDir`, parallelism
- `/onBeforePrerenderStart` — provide URLs for parameterized routes (build-time)
- `/onPrerenderStart` — transform prerender list (e.g. i18n locale duplication)

## HTTP headers, env vars & security
- `/headers` — read request headers/cookies (`pageContext.headers`)
- `/headersResponse` — `+headersResponse`: response headers, `Set-Cookie`, cache/security (beta)
- `/env` — env vars, `.env`, `PUBLIC_ENV__` prefix, client vs server, secrets, `import.meta.env`
- `/csp` — `+csp`: Content Security Policy nonce, `pageContext.cspNonce`
- `/redirects` — `+redirects`: 301 redirects, params, glob/wildcard, aliasing

## Deployment
Vike runs as server middleware, or as pre-rendered static output.
- `/deploy` — overview: static vs serverless vs self-hosted
- Static hosts: `/static-hosts` · `/github-pages` · `/netlify` · `/cloudflare-pages` (deprecated → `/cloudflare`)
- Serverless/edge: `/cloudflare` (Workers, D1/KV/Durable Objects) · `/vercel` (ISR/edge, `vite-plugin-vercel`) · `/edgeone-pages` · `/aws-lambda` · `/netlify-functions`
- Self-hosted: `/aws` · `/docker`
- `/deploy-sync` — seamless deploys, hashed-asset detection, full-reload fallback

## Integrations
- `/auth` — authentication: `pageContext.user`, guards, redirects, SSR/SSG, Auth.js/Passport/Auth0
- `/store` — state management + SSR hydration (Redux/Zustand/Pinia), `passToClient`
- `/css-in-js` — CSS-in-JS SSR, FOUC prevention, style collection (styled-components, …)
- `/markdown` — Markdown/MDX, frontmatter, blogs/docs
- `/graphql` — GraphQL SSR (Apollo/Relay/urql)
- `/error-tracking` — Sentry/Bugsnag via `+onError` and `+client.js`
- `/integration` — third-party libs, analytics, service workers, view transitions, non-JS backends, manual server integration

## Tool integration guides (one page per tool; index: `/tools`)
Most are "how to use X with Vike" + example. Official `vike-*` extensions noted; otherwise community examples.
- UI frameworks: React `/react` (`vike-react`; exp. RSC `vike-react-rsc`) · Vue `/vue` (`vike-vue`) · Solid `/solid` (`vike-solid`) · Preact `/preact` · Svelte `/svelte` · Angular `/angular` · VanJS `/vanjs`
- Server frameworks: Express `/express` · Hono `/hono` · Fastify `/fastify` · H3 `/h3` · Nitro `/nitro` · Koa `/koa` · hapi `/hapi` · HatTip `/hattip` · Deno `/deno` · Firebase `/firebase` · Ruby on Rails `/ruby-on-rails` · Nginx `/nginx` · PM2 `/PM2`
- Data fetching / RPC / realtime: Telefunc `/telefunc` · tRPC `/tRPC` · TanStack Query `/tanstack-query` (`vike-{react,vue,solid}-query`) · Vue Query `/vue-query` · Apollo `/apollo-graphql` (`vike-react-apollo`) · Relay `/relay` · urql `/urql` · gRPC `/grpc` · Socket.IO `/socket-io`
- Routing libraries: React Router `/react-router` · Vue Router `/vue-router` · TanStack Router `/tanstack-router`
- State management: Redux `/redux` · Pinia `/pinia` · Vuex `/vuex` · PullState `/pullstate` · Effector `/effector`
- Styling / CSS: Tailwind CSS `/tailwind-css` · Panda CSS `/panda-css` · Sass/Less/Stylus `/sass` · styled-components `/styled-components` · styled-jsx `/styled-jsx` · Compiled `/compiled`
- UI component libraries: MUI `/mui` · Ant Design `/antd` · Chakra UI `/chakra` · Mantine `/mantine` · daisyUI `/daisyui` · Vuetify `/vuetify` · PrimeReact `/primereact` · NextUI `/nextui` · Bootstrap `/bootstrap` · Grommet `/grommet` · Naive UI `/naive-ui` · Element Plus `/element-plus`
- Auth: Auth.js `/Auth.js`
- i18n: vue-i18n `/vue-i18n` · Lingui `/lingui`
- Testing (note: Vike's Vite plugin is NOT loaded under these): Vitest `/vitest` (E2E via Vike JS API) · Storybook `/storybook` (target `+Page` UI components)
- Other: Tauri `/tauri` · MDXEditor `/MDXEditor` · Payload CMS `/payload` · WSL `/wsl`

## Build, performance & troubleshooting
- `/common-issues` — troubleshooting hub (broken packages, `ssr.noExternal`, hydration mismatch)
- `/broken-npm-package` — fix invalid-JS/CJS packages via `ssr.noExternal`; ESM/CJS errors
- `/hints` — "window is not defined": server vs client, `.client.js`, `typeof window`
- `/hydration-mismatch` — server/client HTML divergence; React/Vue suppressors; causes
- `/debug` — `DEBUG=vike:*` flags, inspect dist, disable minification
- `/client-runtimes-conflict` — both routing runtimes loaded (Rollup split misconfig)
- `/client-runtime-duplicated` — Vike client runtime bundled twice
- `/eject` — copy extension code into your repo for full customization
- `/multiple-renderer` — multiple `renderer/` for per-section rendering / mixed frameworks
- `/build-your-own-framework` — build a company framework on Vike (extensions, custom settings/CLI)
- `/img` — image optimization (recommended libs; no built-in optimizer)
- `/static-directory` — `public/` static assets, hashing/caching
- `/path-aliases` — import aliases (vite.config + tsconfig + package.json)
- `/preloading` — asset preloading, HTTP 103 Early Hints, `injectFilter`
- `/lazy-transpiling` — on-demand per-page transpiling (dev perf at scale)

## Warnings & errors
- `/warning/setup` — wrong setup (Vite/Vike plugin in prod); dev vs prod separation
- `/warning/global-config` — don't define global configs locally
- `/warning/version-mismatch` — don't load multiple Vike versions
- `/warning/internals` — using Vike internals (`_`-props, `dangerouslyUseInternals`)
- `/error/runtime-in-config` — no runtime code in `+config.js` (use pointer imports)
- `/no-side-exports` — no side exports in `+` files (code-splitting/bundle size)
- `/NODE_ENV` — `process.env.NODE_ENV` dev vs prod values

## Migration (upgrading existing Vike code)
- `/migration` — index of breaking changes
- `/migration/v1` — 0.4.x → 1.0.0 (types → `vike/types`, type renames)
- `/migration/v1-design` — `.page.js` → `+config` files; `render()` → `onRenderClient`/`onRenderHtml`
- `/why-the-v1-design` — rationale: extensibility, composable extensions, per-page framework/SSR
- `/migration/settings` — settings from `vite.config.js` → `+config.js`
- `/migration/hook-types` — use `PageContextServer`/`Client` instead of deprecated hook-type exports
- `/migration/cli` — Vite CLI/JS API → Vike `dev`/`build`/`preview`; `createDevMiddleware`
- `/migration/server` — `vike-photon` → `+server.js` (`export default fetch`)
- `/migration/vike-photon` — `vike-server` → `vike-photon` (`@photonjs/*`)
- `/migration/vike-cloudflare` — `vike-cloudflare` 0.1 → 0.2
- `/migration/0.4` · `/migration/0.4.23` · `/migration/0.4.134` — version-specific breaking changes

## Concepts, glossary & reference
- `/what-is-SSR-and-SPA` — SSR vs SPA primer
- `/SSR-vs-SPA` — SSR vs SPA tradeoffs; when to use `+ssr`
- `/hydration` — what hydration is
- `/ui-frameworks` — what "UI framework" means (React/Vue/Solid/Angular/Svelte/Preact)
- `/spa` — SPA definition
- `/RPC` — RPC definition (Telefunc/tRPC vs GraphQL/REST)
- `/glossary` — terminology index (isomorphic, HMR, SSR/SSG/SPA)
- `/settings` — settings reference index
- `/license` — `+license` commercial license key (not secret; safe to commit)
- `/versioning` — versioning policy (non-strict semver, deprecation warnings)
- `/languages` — docs translations
- `/faq` — support, contributing, CSS leakage, dev HTTP requests
